name: CWSI - Board Pack PDF (Route 3, HTML -> Gotenberg Chromium)

parameters.content:
## Board Pack PDF — HTML -> headless Chrome (Route 3)

WHAT: the dashboard POSTs the CWSI-branded board-pack HTML; we wrap it as index.html,
send it to **Gotenberg** (Chromium) to render a real vector PDF, and return it as
base64. Matches the artifact design AND keeps selectable text.

SETUP (one-time):
1. Run a Gotenberg instance reachable from n8n. Docker:
     docker run --rm -p 3000:3000 gotenberg/gotenberg:8
   (host it anywhere n8n can reach; for n8n cloud it must be a PUBLIC https URL).
2. Open the **Gotenberg: render** HTTP node and set the URL to:
     https://YOUR-GOTENBERG-HOST/forms/chromium/convert/html
3. Activate. Copy the PRODUCTION webhook URL from the Webhook node.
4. In the dashboard .env set:
     VITE_BOARDPACK_PDF_WEBHOOK_URL=<that production URL>

NOTES:
- printBackground=true is set so the navy cover / gradients / chips render.
- The HTML is self-contained (inline CSS + base64 logo); fonts load from Google
  Fonts at render time (Chromium has network) with a system fallback.
- Confidential: keep Gotenberg on infra you control — the board figures pass
  through it. Do NOT point at an untrusted public converter.
